titles.en: Punishment of giving more importance to a mortgaged thing than a believer
Punishment of giving more importance to a mortgaged thing than a believer

segments: حَدَّثَنِی سَعْدُ بْنُ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ عَنْ یَعْقُوبَ بْنِ یَزِیدَ عَنْ مَرْوَکِ بْنِ عُبَیْدٍ عَنْ بَعْضِ أَصْحَابِنَا عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ: مَنْ کَانَ الرَّهْنُ عِنْدَهُ أَوْثَقَ مِنْ أَخِیهِ الْمُسْلِمِ فَأَنَا مِنْهُ بَرِی ءٌ.
arabic.text: حَدَّثَنِی سَعْدُ بْنُ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ عَنْ یَعْقُوبَ بْنِ یَزِیدَ عَنْ مَرْوَکِ بْنِ عُبَیْدٍ عَنْ بَعْضِ أَصْحَابِنَا عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ: مَنْ کَانَ الرَّهْنُ عِنْدَهُ أَوْثَقَ مِنْ أَخِیهِ الْمُسْلِمِ فَأَنَا مِنْهُ بَرِی ءٌ.

segments: 1. My father (rah) said: it was narrated to me by Sa’d b. Abdillah from Ya’qub b. Yazid from Marwak b. ’Ubayd from some of our companions from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said: “I hate the person who gives more importance to a mortgaged thing than a Muslim brother.”
en.sayed-athar-husain-rizvi-&-sayed-maqs.text: 1. My father (rah) said: it was narrated to me by Sa’d b. Abdillah from Ya’qub b. Yazid from Marwak b. ’Ubayd from some of our companions from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said: “I hate the person who gives more importance to a mortgaged thing than a Muslim brother.”
